zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Neville於1444年出生在英國波藍德雷爾可爾德時，她的父親Richard Neville43歲，母親Alice Montagu39歲。她去世於1506年11月20日之後在英國艾可卡素 丁加姆，埋葬在英國艾可易阿爾斯 可爾內。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Neville于1444年出生在英国波藍德雷爾可爾德时，她的父亲Richard Neville43岁，母亲Alice Montagu39岁。她去世于1506年11月20日之后在英国艾可卡素 丁加姆，埋葬在英国艾可易阿爾斯 可爾內。

nameMeanings.name: Neville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Neville was born in 1444, in Threlkeld, Cumberland, England, her father, Richard Neville, was 43 and her mother, Alice Montagu, was 39. She died after 20 November 1506, in Castle Hedingham, Essex, England, and was buried in Earls Colne, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Neville est née en 1444, à Threlkeld, Cumberland, Angleterre, son père, Richard Neville, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Alice Montagu, avait 39 ans. Elle est décédée après 20 novembre 1506, à Castle Hedingham, Essex, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Earls Colne, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Neville 1444 in Threlkeld, Cumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Neville 43 und ihre Mutter Alice Montagu 39. Sie starb nach 20. November 1506 in Castle Hedingham, Essex, England und wurde in Earls Colne, Essex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Neville è nata il nel 1444 nel Threlkeld, Cumberland, England, sua padre, Richard Neville, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Alice Montagu, aveva 39 anni. Morì dopo il 20 novembre 1506, nel Castle Hedingham, Essex, England, e fu sepolta a Earls Colne, Essex, England.

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Neville(이)가 1444년 영국 쿠벌랜드 스렐켈드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Neville(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Montagu(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 1506년 11월 20일 이후 영국 에세스 카스틀 헤딩함에서 사망했으며 영국 에세스 에를스 코니에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Neville nasceu em 1444, em Threlkeld, Cumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Neville, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Alice Montagu, tinha 39 anos. Ela faleceu após 20 de novembro de 1506, em Castle Hedingham, Essex, Inglaterra, e foi sepultada em Earls Colne, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Neville родилась в 1444 г. в местности трелкелд, кумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Neville было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Montagu, 39. Она умерла после 20 ноябрь 1506 г. в местности кастл хедингхам, эссекс, Англия и была похоронена в местности эарлс колн, эссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Neville nació en 1444, en Threlkeld, Cumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Neville, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Alice Montagu, tenía 39 años. Murió después de 20 de noviembre de 1506, en Castle Hedingham, Essex, Inglaterra, y fue sepultada en Earls Colne, Essex, Inglaterra.
